choices.text: Capacity + safety record (EMR/TRIR) + financial stability + references + schedule history + pricing. Lowest bid not always best — pad or default risk. Prequalification process critical for non-public projects.

questions.explanation: Prequalify on safety + capacity + finances + price.

choices.text: Most common cause: late payment. Pay on time per contract; release retention promptly; in some contracts pay subs before contractor paid. Late pay = sub leaves = schedule + budget disaster. Liquidated damages + backcharges for actual sub default.

questions.explanation: Late pay = sub leaves. Pay on time.
